transcriptSourceDescriptions.realtime: What AccordMesh captured during the meeting.
transcriptSourceDescriptions.recording: A transcript created later from the attached recording.
transcriptSourceDescriptions.uploaded: The transcript created from the uploaded file.
transcriptSourceDescriptions.unknown: Transcript content whose source could not be identified.

untimedTranscriptNotice: TXT files do not contain source timestamps. Paragraphs are shown in their original order.
noArtifacts: No results in this section yet.
exportWarning: Exported files are unencrypted and stored outside the AccordMesh vault.
renameOnly: Only the project title can be changed.
humanReadableExportDescription: Markdown and TXT create readable reports. The full transcript is left out unless you include it.
jsonAuditNote: JSON includes the full structured transcript, selected results, processing history, and technical provenance.

workspaceDescriptions.transcript: Review the original transcript, translations, and timeline.
workspaceDescriptions.analysis: Review the meeting summary and communication feedback.
workspaceDescriptions.minutes: Review the latest meeting-minutes draft and earlier versions.
workspaceDescriptions.comparison: Compare the live capture with a recording added later.
workspaceDescriptions.files: Review source files and export meeting results.
workspaceDescriptions.history: Review processing activity, failures, retries, and generated-result history.

availableOutputsDescription: Open the latest transcript, analysis, minutes, or comparison.
generationHistoryDescription: Processing attempts, provider details, and outcomes.

markdown.title: Markdown
markdown.description: Readable report that is easy to edit and share.

txt.title: TXT
txt.description: Simple text file that works in almost any app.

json.title: JSON
json.description: Complete structured audit file with technical provenance.

transcriptOptionDescription: The transcript is not included unless you select this option.
jsonAlwaysIncludesTranscript: JSON is the complete audit file and always includes transcript evidence.
exportConfirmDescription: AccordMesh will save an unencrypted {{format}} file outside the local vault.
exportIncludesTranscript: This report will include the full transcript.
exportExcludesTranscript: This report will not include the full transcript.
exportCancelled: Export cancelled. No file was written.

regeneration.title: Regenerate result
regeneration.description: Choose the AI provider, model, and output language for the new result version.
regeneration.singleModelNote: This provider currently has one configured model for this task.
regeneration.noCompatibleProvider: No configured AI provider supports this type of result.
regeneration.versionNotice: A new version will be created. The current result and its provenance will remain unchanged.
regeneration.mockProviderAvailable: Runs locally with deterministic test output.
regeneration.configuredNotVerified: Configured, but credentials and connectivity have not been verified.
regeneration.minutesSourcesNotice: Uses the currently selected Meeting understanding and Communication feedback versions.

failedProcessingDescription: These attempts did not replace any successful result version. Review the error before retrying.
invalidSavedRequestHint: This saved request is incomplete and cannot be retried. Create a new run from the relevant result.
segmentInsightsDescription: Review detailed insights for individual transcript segments.
segmentInsightFallback: Open this segment to review the detailed analysis.
noUsableArtifacts: No completed, readable result version is available.
filesSourceDescription: Encrypted source files and transcript inputs attached to this meeting.
